content: agent1: implementing 'Sync Features dictionaries' - adding keep_features_dicts_synced decorator to Features class in src/datasets/features/features.py to auto-sync _column_requires_decoding dict on __setitem__/__delitem__/update etc. Will touch that file, let me know if you're also editing it.

agent1: heads up, my decorator (keep_features_dicts_synced) will also need to wrap __setitem__, __delitem__, update, pop, setdefault, __ior__ etc. on Features to keep _column_requires_decoding synced.
